programme.title: Save The Future-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: A version of Kanishk from the future warns present-day Kanishk about the future.

programme.title: Diwali Gift-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: With Diwali right around the corner, Kanishk comes up with a plan to ruin it for Kris.

programme.title: Switch, The-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Krish is a divine child sent to safeguard the children of the Mathura orphanage.

programme.title: Maakhan Chor SE Choriwheres The Bu-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Kanishk manages to put Kris under a spell where he starts to crave ice-cream.

programme.title: Egg Game-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Kanishk gives the children the task of protecting an egg in order to adopt a puppy.

programme.title: Pocket Money-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble.

programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, always finds himself in trouble because of his actions.

programme.desc: While trying to hide from the secretary, Titoo wears a teddy bear outfit and gets stuck in it.

programme.desc: During the fest, Titoo and Shera engage in a competition as to whose stall is better.

programme.desc: Whilst going to work, Titoo's father tries to park but collides with the secretary's car.

programme.title: Papa Ke Taauji-Titoo
programme.desc: The children are enjoying a wrestling match when Titoo's paternal uncle pays a visit.

programme.title: Voice Changer-Titoo
programme.desc: An organisation dedicated to saving frogs convenes to elect their next president.

programme.title: Titoo Machhar-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo's spray repellent mutates the mosquito into a human-sized monster.

programme.title: Ek Jhooth Hazar Jhooth-Titoo
programme.desc: After ditching school for a carnival, Titoo lies to Meva Uncle to avoid punishment.

programme.title: Titoo The Junior Chef-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo enters a cake competition to join a cooking show, but must thwart Shera's sabotage.

programme.title: Titoo Express-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo and Shera face misadventures after they encounter Chavangi Gang in a goods train. S09 E18.

programme.title: Hot Air Balloon-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo and his society lose control of the balloon and work together to land safely. S10E18.

programme.title: Andhvishwas-Titoo
programme.desc: A power outage gives Shera an opportunity to cause mischief, but Titoo has his own plans.

programme.title: Society Me Tabela-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble.

programme.title: Shlok Nahi Raha Slow-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo gives Shlok a pair of magical shoes to help him defeat Shera in a skating race.

programme.title: Free Pizza Ki Saja-Titoo
programme.desc: Shera makes a cunning plan to get free pizza, but Titoo decides to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: Shera Ki Cycle-Titoo
programme.desc: The children of Lucky Home Society are enthralled by the unique design of Shera's cycle. S02E26.

programme.title: Khujli Waale Patte-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, always finds himself in trouble because of his actions. S06E01.

programme.title: Cash Machine-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean tries to take out cash, but he gets stuck trying to retrieve his card from the machine. S02E06.

programme.title: Litterbugs-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean, upset with litter being thrown everywhere, starts tidying up the streets. S02E07.

programme.title: Rat Trap-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: When an uninvited bothersome pest arrives, Mr Bean has to find a solution to dispense it. S02E08.

programme.title: Valentine's Bean-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean endeavours to be romantic with Irma, but they misunderstand each other's feelings. S02E09.

programme.title: All You Can Eat-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: After Mr Bean forgets Irma is coming for dinner, he participates in a pie-eating contest. S02E10.

programme.title: Flat Pack-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean purchases a bookcase but realises a screw is missing after the shop closes. S02E11.

programme.title: Matching Shirt-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, always finds himself in trouble because of his actions. S06E02.

programme.title: Good Luck-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo attempts to bring good fortune to all those around him. S06E03.

programme.title: History Teacher Ki Historical Pen-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo springs into action when his history teacher is swindled by fake antique dealers. S06E04.

programme.title: Luka Chuppi Ka Khel-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo helps Katrina attend a wedding after the Secretary denies her leave. S06E05.

programme.title: Ghar Ki Shifting-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo comes up with a plan to stop his mom from moving to another location. S06E06.

programme.title: New Year Resolution-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo avoids pizza for a week to become the winner of Shrivastav Sir's challenge. S06E08.

programme.title: News Reporter Titoo-Titoo
programme.desc: During his mathematics class at the Blue City International school, Shlok falls asleep. S06E09.

programme.title: Titoo Ka Dragon Dost-Titoo
programme.desc: After a series of mishaps, Tottoo and Golu buy a dragon egg from a careless shopkeeper. S07E14.

programme.title: Titoo Bana Secretary-Titoo
programme.desc: Things take an unexpected turn when Titoo is asked to become the building secretary. S06E10.

programme.title: Swachh School Abhiyaan-Titoo
programme.desc: Tito and Shera learn that a rival principal is trying to ruin their school's impression. S06E11.

programme.title: Animal Voice Converter-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo unexpectedly discovers a unique machine that translates animals' voices. S06E12.

programme.title: Antt Bhala Toh Sab Bhala-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo's parents get into a heated argument due to a sofa set. S06E13.

programme.title: Kabootar Ke Ande-Titoo
programme.desc: Shera hides pigeon eggs to avoid working which later causes trouble. S06E15.

programme.title: Society Mein Gorilla-Titoo
programme.desc: A thief in a gorilla suit robs home in the town wrecking havoc. S06E16.

programme.title: Bubble Ka Trouble-Titoo
programme.desc: In a flying bubble competition, Titoo's bubble makes a water tanker spillage. S06E17.

programme.title: Christmas Celebration-Titoo
programme.desc: Christmas falls into great danger when Ranga pretends to be Santa Claus. S06E18.

programme.title: Fukrey Boyzzz
programme.desc: On the occasion of Comedy Day, the Fukrey gang are assigned the task of making Chuski sir laugh. S01 E55.

programme.title: Fukrey Boyzzz
programme.desc: Choocha's shadow starts talking to him and makes things easier for him in school. S01 E56.

programme.title: Little Singham
programme.desc: Little Singham, an honest but ferocious police officer, fights against injustice. S01E82.
